name: Grapenuts Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the Grape Nuts and apple juice concentrate in a bowl until well combined.
2. Press the mixture into a pie dish, shaping it to fit the bottom and sides of the pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
4. If adding a cool filling, allow the crust to cool completely before serving with the filling. For pumpkin pie, add the filling and bake until done.
Note: Run the Grape Nuts through a food processor first if desired, and consider using half the recipe if you don't need the crust to extend high up the sides of the pan.
